item.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE: The Walmart Alibi
item.description: A criminal case examines an alibi linked to a Walmart visit, focusing on evidence, timelines, and how investigators assessed the claim.

item.title: Ohio boy found dead in chimney
item.description: A factual overview of a case in Ohio involving a boy found in a chimney, focusing on confirmed details, the investigation, and findings from authorities.

item.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE: Faith and Fraud
item.description: A case involving allegations of financial exploitation where trust and faith were reportedly misused, highlighting the investigation and its impact on those involved.
